name: fluid-flow
description: Fluid-flow boundary conditions control pore pressure, fluid flux, leakage, head, and well source/sink terms in coupled or flow-only analyses.

notes: Fixed pore pressure permits fluid exchange with the exterior.
Free pore pressure is the default impermeable condition for gridpoints.
Use face discharge/leakage for boundary fluxes via 'zone face apply'.
'well' is a gridpoint-fix keyword — NOT a 'zone face apply' keyword. Use 'zone gridpoint fix well ...' for source/sink style flow.

common_patterns.name: Fixed boundary pore pressure
commands: zone face apply pore-pressure 0 range group 'drain'

common_patterns.name: Free pore pressure condition
commands: zone gridpoint free pore-pressure range group 'sealed'
